source_note: Sanitized public summary derived from repository-backed RANI_OS artifacts read during this session. Public preview does not expose private source details.

inventory_summary.task_list_semantics: active execution slice only, not all work

required_source_coverage.dashboard_role: active work, parked work, owner gate, next executable item
managed candidates, bugs, ideas, deferred and behavior-pass records
rule preventing missing strategic work before neutral comparison
repository orientation; required source for coverage checks

groups.count: managed entries present / exact count not generated
groups.dashboard_role: must not be collapsed into 5 active tasks

groups.count: multiple records present / exact count not generated
multiple records present / exact count not generated

groups.dashboard_role: keeps application work separate from OS infrastructure

not_full_backlog_warning.warning: Candidate Register is not a full backlog
not_full_backlog_warning.dashboard_effect: Do not present Active Execution Slice as total work

not_full_backlog_warning.warning: Candidate Register is not a scheduler or task manager
not_full_backlog_warning.dashboard_effect: Do not auto-select or auto-prioritize from dashboard

not_full_backlog_warning.warning: Managed Work Coverage Check must run before Neutral Next-Work Comparison
not_full_backlog_warning.dashboard_effect: Dashboard must show coverage sources, not only active tasks

not_full_backlog_warning.warning: Capability Roadmap is not a project plan
not_full_backlog_warning.dashboard_effect: Capabilities are system abilities, not task rows

not_full_backlog_warning.warning: Conversation is not source of truth
not_full_backlog_warning.dashboard_effect: Owner correction routed as review finding; repo artifacts remain truth

why_task_count_looked_small.reason: Task List showed active/recent execution slice only
why_task_count_looked_small.meaning: It was not the full backlog and should not be read that way.

why_task_count_looked_small.reason: Candidate Register contains managed candidates, bugs, ideas, and deferred items
why_task_count_looked_small.meaning: Those were underrepresented in the previous preview.
Most completed/managed work lives as artifacts, not active task rows.
It is not the same as task records or candidate records.

why_task_count_looked_small.reason: Candidate Register is not a scheduler
why_task_count_looked_small.meaning: It stores managed candidates but must not auto-select work.
It summarizes private registers without exposing full internal detail.

next_dashboard_improvements.label: Generate exact sanitized candidate-register count table from source file
next_dashboard_improvements.status: next candidate if owner wants exact counts
